description: 适用于 Windows 平台上主流命令行包管理器的直观图形用户界面 | An intuitive GUI for the most common CLI package managers on Windows
notes_cn: 在以下问题解决之前，abyss 中不会移除 UniGetUI 的 pending 状态:
1. 和 scoop-i18n 冲突，当安装它后，scoop-i18n 会直接失效
2. 和 scoop 的兼容性较差，部分仅含标准字段的清单都无法正常安装和更新
3. 标准数据目录下存在的相关数据无法正常持久化
4. 如果为 $env:LocalAppData\UniGetUI 目录创建 link，则安装程序会静默失败
5. UniGetUI 中的安装日志存在乱码信息，日志可读性较差
notes: The pending status of UniGetUI will not be removed in abyss until the following issues are resolved:
1. Conflict with scoop-i18n; once installed, scoop-i18n will stop working directly.
2. Poor compatibility with Scoop; some manifests containing only standard fields cannot be installed and updated properly.
3. The relevant data existing under the standard data directory cannot be persisted normally.
4. If a link is created for the $env:LocalAppData\UniGetUI directory, the installation process will fail silently.
5. The installation log of UniGetUI contains garbled text, making it unreadable.
